scenarios.name: Commit a timezone bug fix in date utility
scenarios.rationale: Treatment inspects with git diff --cached, writes a Conventional Commits fix(scope) subject in imperative mood with a WHY-focused body and Fixes #N reference using the documented heredoc git commit pattern; baseline produces a plain message without scope or the staged-diff inspection step.

scenarios.name: Commit a mixed chore: README, .env.example, typo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment categorizes the diff, picks chore type, uses bullet body per SKILL.md guidance for multiple small changes, and verifies with git log --oneline -1; baseline often picks the wrong type or jams it into one vague subject.
